howItWorks.intro: This flexibility score calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Rating
rules.formula: Based on deviation from age/gender average norms
rules.explanation: Your sit-and-reach score compared to normative data from fitness testing standards.

howItWorks.outro: Individual results vary based on metabolism, genetics, and activity level. Consult your doctor before starting any program.

faq.q: How do I do the sit-and-reach test?
faq.a: Sit on the floor with legs straight and feet flat against a box or wall. Reach forward slowly as far as possible with both hands. Measure the distance past your toes (positive) or before your toes (negative). Take the best of 3 attempts.

faq.q: What is a good sit-and-reach score?
faq.a: For adult males, 25+ cm is above average and 34+ cm is excellent. For females, 29+ cm is above average and 37+ cm is excellent. Flexibility naturally decreases with age but is highly trainable at any age.

howWeCalculate.intro: This flexibility score calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.

howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.
